programs.title: Salvage Hunters
programs.desc: Drew Pritchard is thrilled to look through an oddball collection of military antiques in Nantes, France. Plus, he takes an interest in a de Sede sofa bed in the Netherlands.

programs.title: How Do They Do It?
programs.desc: How do the islanders of the Outer Hebrides use pedal power to weave world-famous Harris tweed? And, in Iceland, how do they prepare fermented shark?

programs.title: How Do They Do It?
programs.sub_title: Beds, Space Freighters and Underground Farms
programs.desc: How do they make the world's most expensive and luxurious beds? And, how do they deliver supplies and equipment to the International Space Station?

programs.title: Wheeler Dealers
programs.desc: Mike and Ant share their favourite moments from the series, revealing the hilarious outtakes, behind-the-scenes moments and private insights.

programs.title: Tanked
programs.desc: Wayde and Brett are asked to create two tanks for hip-hop megastar Akon's dream house - but their own dreams of musical stardom look set to derail the build.

programs.title: Gold Rush
programs.desc: With no paycheck for five weeks, Todd Hoffman's close-knit team turn on each other. Parker's gamble to run his washplant without protection from rocks proves costly. Tony builds a $10,000 mega-trailer to move his barge but gets his measurements wrong.
